steps.title: Isolate y to read off the slope of line h
Flip and negate for the perpendicular slope
steps.content: Perpendicular shortcut: negative reciprocal of $-\tfrac{7}{5}$ is $\tfrac{5}{7}$. Perpendicular slopes multiply to $-1$, and $(-\tfrac{7}{5})(\tfrac{5}{7})=-1$, confirming the slope. That matches Choice D — $\frac{5}{7}$.
